automoderator-config-validator-array-too: $1 waxa ku jira waxyaabo aad u badan (ugu badnaan $2 {{PLURAL:$2|waa la oggol yahay|ayaa la oggol yahay}})
automoderator-config-validator-contentmo: Iswaafajin la'aan nooca nuxurka: faylka habayntu waa inuu lahaadaa nooca nuxurka JSON, balse $1 ayaa la ogaaday
automoderator-config-validator-datatype-: $1 waxaa la filayey inuu noqdo $2, balse waa $3
automoderator-desc: Si toos ah ayuu u celiyaa wax ka beddellada xun isagoo ku salaynaya qiimeyn ay bixisay nooc waxbarasho mashiin.
automoderator-wiki-revert-message-header: $1 $2: $3 dib u celiyay wax ka beddelkaagii
automoderator-wiki-revert-message-help-p: * Si aad wax badan uga barato tafatirka, fadlan eeg boggan caawinta: [[$1]].
automoderator-wiki-revert-message-follow: Waxaan sidoo kale dib u celiyay mid ka mid ah [[Special:Diff/$1|wax ka beddelladaadii dhawaa]] ee [[$2]] sababtoo ah waxay u muuqatay mid aan wax dhisayn.
automoderator-wiki-revert-edit-summary: Ogeysiis ku saabsan ka noqoshada otomaatiga ah ee [[$1]]
automoderator-wiki-revertpage-nouser: Wuxuu dib u noqay {{PLURAL:$7|badalkii|badaladii}} uu sameeyay isticmaale qarsoon kuna celiyay badalkii ka danbeeyay oo sameeyay {{GENDER:$1|[[User:$1|$1]]}}
automoderator-wiki-revertpage-anon: Wuxuu dib u noqay {{PLURAL:$7|badalkii|badaladii}} uu sameeyay [[Special:Contributions/$2|$2]] kuna celiyay badalkii ka  danbeeyay oo sameeyay [[User:$1|$1]]
automoderator-wiki-revertpage: Wuxuu dib u noqay {{PLURAL:$7|badalkii|badaladii}} uu sameeyay [[Special:Contributions/$2|$2]] ([[User talk:$2|wadahadal]]) kuna celiyay badalkii ka  danbeeyay oo sameeyay [[User:$1|$1]]
communityconfiguration-automoderator-aut: Xuquuqda isticmaalaha
Automoderator waa shidanyahay
Dib u celin uu sameeyo AutoModerator waxaa loo tixgelin doonaa wax ka beddello yaryar.
Fariin bogga wadahadalka
Fariinta bogga wadahadalka waa shidantahay
Bogga warbixinta been ee togan
Ugu taxaddar badan (caadi): wax ka beddellada ugu yar ayaa la celin doonaa, balse saxnaanta ayaa noqon doonta tan ugu sarreysa.
Taxaddar leh: wax ka beddello yar ayaa la celin doonaa, balse saxnaantu waxay noqon doontaa dhexdhexaad.
Si dhexdhexaad ah taxaddar leh: wax ka beddello badan ayaa la celin doonaa, balse saxnaantu waxay noqon doontaa mid hoose.
Ugu yar ee taxaddarka: tirada ugu badan ee wax ka beddellada ayaa la celin doonaa, balse saxnaantu waxay noqon doontaa tan ugu hooseysa.
Deji xadka
Iska hagaha otomaatiga ah
Wax ka beddelidda yaryar
Cadee xuquuqaha isticmaalaha ee dadka haysta aanay Automoderator waligiis dib u celin doonin.
Dib u celinta uu sameeyo Automoderator waxaa loo tixgelin doonaa wax ka beddello bot ah.
Wax ka bedelka bot
communityconfiguration-automoderator-inf: Digniin! Marka isbeddello la sameeyo, waxay si toos ah u saameyn doonaan dhammaan isticmaalayaasha bulshadaada. Waa muhiim in si taxaddar iyo si ula kac ah loo shaqeeyo. Ka dood oo gaadh go’aan wadajir ah ka hor inta aanad samayn isbeddello ku saabsan qaabaynta.
communityconfiguration-automoderator-aut: Kordhintu wuxuu adeegsadaa moodallo cusub oo qiimeynaya khatarta dib u celinta, kuwaas oo xisaabin kara dhibco u gaar ah wax ka beddel kasta si loo muujiyo suurtogalnimada in wax ka beddelkaas la celiyo. Moodalladani waxay taageeraan oo keliya mashaariicda Wikipedia, waxaana lagu tababaray qaybta ugu weyn (maqaalka). Deji xad  kaas oo ka sarreeya wax ka beddellada si toos ah loo celin doono. Xad hoose wuxuu ka dhigan yahay in wax ka beddello badan la celinayo, balse saxnaantu way yaraanaysaa; halka xad sare uu keeno in wax ka beddello yar la celiyo, balse saxnaantu ay ka fiicnaato.

Ka dib marka Automoderator uu dib u celiyay wax ka beddel, si otomaatig ah ayaa fariin loogu diri karaa bogga wadahadalka ee tafatiraha, taas oo sharxaysa waxa dhacay isla markaana bixinaysa xiriirro waxtar leh.

Falalka
  • Fadlan ku dar tarjumaadaha adigoo isticmaalaya [https://translatewiki.net/w/i.php?title=Special%3ATranslate&group=ext-automoderator&language={{CONTENTLANGUAGE}}&action=translate&filter= translatewiki].
  • Si aad u beddesho fariinta gaarka ah ee bogga wadahadalka, wax ka beddel [{{fullurl:Special:AllMessages|prefix=automoderator-wiki&filter=all&limit=50}} fariimaha nidaamka].

Faahfaahinta wax-ka-beddelka

Soo koobidda wax-ka-beddelka Automoderator waxaa lagu turjumi karaa translatewiki, sidoo kalena waxaa lagu beddeli karaa gudaha wiki-ga.

Falalka
  • Fadlan ku dar tarjumaadaha adigoo adeegsanaya [https://translatewiki.net/w/i.php?title=Special%3ATranslate&group=ext-automoderator&language={{CONTENTLANGUAGE}}&action=translate&filter= translatewiki].
  • Si aad u dejiso fariin gaar ah oo bogga wadahadalka ah, wax ka beddel [{{fullurl:Special:AllMessages|prefix=automoderator-wiki&filter=all&limit=50}} fariimaha nidaamka].
[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Minor_edit Help:Wax ka beddel yar]
[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Manual:Bots#The_%22bot%22_flag Manual:Botyada]
communityconfiguration-automoderator-des: Deji dejinta Automoderator si moodalku u awoodo inuu aqoonsado oo uu dib u celiyo wax ka beddellada laga yaabo inay xun yihiin ee Wikipedia.
automoderator-config-validator-userright: Xuquuqda isticmaalaha $1 ma jirto. Fadlan isku day mid kale.
communityconfiguration-automoderator-aut: Dib u celinta isticmaalaha ee bog kasta

Cadee inta jeer ee Automoderator uu dib u celin karo isla isticmaalaha isla bogga gudaheeda 24 saac gudahood. Haddii xaddidaadda dib u celinta isticmaalaha ee bog kasta la shido oo tan aan la dejin, Automoderator wuxuu dib u celin karaa isla isticmaalaha tiro aan xad lahayn oo jeer ah.
Daar xaddidaadda dib u celinta isticmaalaha ee bog kasta
Waxay awood u siisaa astaanta lagu qeexayo inta jeer ee Automoderator uu dib u celin karo isla isticmaalaha isla bogga gudaheeda 24 saac gudahood.
automoderator-config-validator-user-reve: Qiimaha la geliyay Dib u celinta isticmaalaha ee bog kasta ma aha tiro, fadlan isku day mid kale.
communityconfiguration-automoderator-aut: Xiriir u samee bog kaa caawinaya tafatirka
Bogga loo socdo

Fariinta bogga wadahadalka ee ka qaybgalayaasha aan la diiwaangelin ayaa muujin doonta xiriir u gudbiya bog ka caawiya tafatirka. Xiriirkan waxaa loo habayn karaa inuu noqdo xiriir kasta oo ku jira wiki-ga.
automoderator-config-validator-help-page: Goobta Bogga loo socdo iyo goobta Calaamada labadaba waa in la buuxiyaa.
automoderator-config-validator-multiling: Xadka luqado badan waa inuu noqdaa tiro.
Qaabka luqado badan lama shidin, balse xad ayaa la dejiyay. Fadlan shid qaabka luqado badan.
Qaabka aan ku xirnayn luqad iyo qaabka luqado badan labadaba waa la doortay. Fadlan shid kaliya mid ka mid ah labada qaab.
